ModMetaData.name: PawnDiary: RimTalk bridge
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description:
Let conversations and diaries feel like parts of the same life.
At the default level, colonists carry recent diary memories into RimTalk conversations. Turn on conversation capture and the few chats worth remembering can become one shared diary event with two points of view. Persona sync and colony context stay optional.
Requires Pawn Diary and RimTalk.
